---
title: "On Data Visualization Design"
description: "I was invited to speak last year at the World Information Architecture Day 2016 in Manila on data visualization design and use cases. The video is available for viewing."
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 02-05-2017
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: images/20170205-wiad-2016-grammar-graphics.png
categories:
  - talks
  - dataviz
  - philippines
  - social commentary
type: Talks
---

Last year, I was invited to speak at [World Information Architecture Day 2016](http://www.2016.worldiaday.org/location/manila-phillippines) in Manila, held at A-Space, Makati. I covered an introduction to data use cases, and how to think about designing data visualizations, and why I think designing the right ways for people to consume insights from data is just as important than our ability to process or analyze them.

The video is up for people to watch. Please let me know your thoughts at the comments section. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LR_KXA3nZ_Y" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you'd like to view the slides more clearly, I've uploaded them to slideshare:

<iframe src="//www.slideshare.net/slideshow/embed_code/key/fjRlrhDHRiBsoB" width="100%" height="485" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" style="border:1px solid #CCC; border-width:1px; margin-bottom:5px; max-width: 100%;" allowfullscreen> </iframe>
